summary: SQL migration files exist at supabase/migrations/ (001-005). Migrations 003 (full schema v2), 004 (atomic token deduction), and 005 (webhook events) need to be applied. Database tables (analyses, decks, orders, subscriptions, assets, token_usage, webhook_events) do not yet exist. Cannot connect to Supabase DB from this environment - direct psql connection refused (IPv6/firewall) and no Supabase management access token available. Migrations must be applied manually via the Supabase SQL Editor at https://supabase.com/dashboard/project/wihdzezziwdcwpkculgo/sql. Run migrations 003, 004, 005 in order (003 supersedes 001+002).
